author: Adam Johnson
message:
Support htmx version 4 (#606)

Vendor htmx 4.0.0-beta5 alongside htmx 2, and add a 'version' argument
to the `htmx_script` template tags to select between them. The default
htmx version remains at 2, since htmx 4 is in beta.

Update the example app to use htmx version 4 and add
`HtmxDetails.source` to the middleware for the new `HX-Source` header.

author: Adam Johnson
message:
Drop Django 4.2 to 5.1 support (#602)

These versions are all EOL since April.

author: Adam Johnson
message: Move example project to use 'uv run' (#600)

author: Adam Johnson
message:
Improve GitHub Actions workflow (#599)

Tidy up some problematic patterns, including some found with
[zizmor](https://docs.zizmor.sh/), and use
[gha-update](https://gha-update.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) to pin GitHub
Actions to specific hashes.

author: Adam Johnson
message:
Use Read the Docs native uv support (#596)

Per https://about.readthedocs.com/blog/2026/04/uv-native-support/.

author: Adam Johnson
message:
Upgrade example project

Use Python 3.14 and Django 6.0, and uv for setup.

author: Adam Johnson
message:
Upgrade pytest configuration (#593)

Use the new proper TOML support [added in pytest
9](https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/changelog.html#pytest-9-0-0-2025-11-05).

author: Adam Johnson
message: Remove debug 'ls' from GitHub Actions workflow

author: Adam Johnson
message:
Improve Coverage.py configuration (#585)

Hide data files within a directory to avoid cluttering the repository
root, and minimize reports.

author: dependabot[bot]
message: Bump the github-actions group with 2 updates (#581)

author: Adam Johnson
message: Add Tidelift link on Sponsor button

author: dependabot[bot]
message: Bump the github-actions group with 2 updates (#577)

author: dependabot[bot]
message:
Bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 in the github-actions group (#573) Bumps the github-actions group with 1 update: [actions/checkout](https://github.com/actions/checkout). Updates `actions/checkout` from 5 to 6
Release notes

Sourced from actions/checkout's releases.

v6.0.0

What's Changed

  • Update README to include Node.js 24 support details and requirements by @​salmanmkc in actions/checkout#2248
  • Persist creds to a separate file by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2286
  • v6-beta by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2298
  • update readme/changelog for v6 by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2311

Full Changelog: https://github.com/actions/checkout/compare/v5.0.0...v6.0.0

v6-beta

What's Changed

Updated persist-credentials to store the credentials under $RUNNER_TEMP instead of directly in the local git config.

This requires a minimum Actions Runner version of v2.329.0 to access the persisted credentials for Docker container action scenarios.

v5.0.1

What's Changed

  • Port v6 cleanup to v5 by @​ericsciple in actions/checkout#2301

Full Changelog: https://github.com/actions/checkout/compare/v5...v5.0.1
